---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Deadlocked Over NEET Row as Government Prepares Anti-Leak Legislation"
date: 2026-07-24T10:30:44.125526+00:00
summary: "Opposition protests over NEET paper leaks have caused a four-day parliamentary washout, while the government plans new legislation to address the crisis"
run_time_ist: "4:00PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:00PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> Both Houses of Parliament have been adjourned until Monday following a fourth consecutive day of disruptions as the INDIA bloc demands the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over the NEET paper leak row.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxPTUxsa3ZOdFZJekZTVGlOUFY0c3N2bnJqSVUwVE00aGdGcE00QWtLbWYxcGQ2cTlOYkxRZXl0R05Vbm0yX3hCUkpoS0dtRDJPZnlOZjVybHl1XzctS3IxYjlWdjdzZ01ucHRCZWpTQXN2eFU2U3hLX0xELUcyN3ZybUtia2ttNVRLQkM0cFBFVlU1OWRyQy16MHoyWGh3OWpTb1l2a3I4dUZaUmMyU3UxcE4zQjhWLUZU?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial and legislative updates:</strong> The Supreme Court has directed the Centre to amend the National Highways Act to ensure judicial determination of land acquisition, while the Lok Sabha prepares to deliberate on the Supreme Court Judges Amendment Bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihAFBVV95cUxPcFJMaTh0YVFuR3h0WjY2N0lUcm96c2QtWnpaS1lIYWZGRmwtMklHYjhaeUNPbzI0eTFLaFdLdnVfWHMxT0QweTFuMDdhTnNoX01aVHo4MTJPdmZfem16S0tKRTVSVkF3TktZSVB5Yms1bFFaNDFLenRKZERTTzd2Z3hCU04?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxNRFI5aXRTSTN6NzZSaklYeXJveS1jQ1BEMm5TY2dncFp1cjYxZTY5cThLWDJQWE0tTXB1NU91ZXNBZjdMRjk4UU9XX29uUlY2Ui00czk2WURLRTFHUXozUEcxX2NkcW9hTXJtQjNXZ0FqU1Z1dVQ2VllaSnZGZno4UkdjaXRGclpKR09mb3Q0NkRwSld5cTlfaXBkUnk2a084bmt3Rkxka0hFWUVWUGpQNGpWb1R1c3c?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Anti-leak legislation:</strong> Prime Minister Modi is set to discuss strict new anti-paper leak legislation in Friday&#x27;s Cabinet meeting, with plans to table the bill in Parliament next week to address systemic examination failures.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political confrontation:</strong> Opposition leaders continue to urge the Prime Minister to address the NEET crisis directly in Parliament rather than through external communications, while the BJP accuses the opposition of politicizing the issue and obstructing necessary debate.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W14</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBVTDZtYmF1WVQ3N09nZl9RUWVtNzQzbkVTRXZYVnlPUkJMcnRmV1Z1bFhSd09OWHQxemlBNlFyVHFGT0FuSy10OEtma21TRG9ZSVRiUzRPZkpGQlIydlpWbkdB?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W15</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBVTDZtYmF1WVQ3N09nZl9RUWVtNzQzbkVTRXZYVnlPUkJMcnRmV1Z1bFhSd09OWHQxemlBNlFyVHFGT0FuSy10OEtma21TRG9ZSVRiUzRPZkpGQlIydlpWbkdB?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W15] BJP seeks Parliament debate on NEET, accuses Congress of politicising issue - Echo Of Arunachal</a> Echo Of Arunachal</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxOMXYxcTRWTUtyWExYMERsNHBwUTQtUjJZYndqbDB3bVVYUjFadlUtaTVXMmFCVGhreHY1NnNmd1k4TksyZ1JYNDR0M09FNFNOTkMxaXVBenJNbVh1eU50eVNPOVpsR3dOY3ZqVFFMUUI1R1ZxdmJqUXltdENwMFlQNlpvZFhjdkpuNDJhcktabHVyRUJGbi1BVDdEMmVGY3pmd0tLQ2V1ZjRxQ1NkdWRNbVBsSng?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[W16] Video | Congress Questions PM&#x27;s Video Message On NEET Row, Urges Statement In Parliament - NDTV</a> NDTV</li>

</ul>

</details>
</article>
